problem_title: Cross-border Travel Rule monitoring remains fragmented
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and gaps when Travel Rule messages and transaction data are siloed across providers. This fragmentation makes it difficult to track originator and beneficiary details, manage exceptions, and maintain a clear audit trail for international transfers.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates originator and beneficiary data, message status, exceptions, wallets and cases into a unified workflow that helps compliance teams monitor cross-border transfers with clear audit evidence.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule message exceptions through status tracking, review workflows, case creation and evidence preservation for cross-border transaction compliance.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for cross-border Travel Rule?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, data, cases and audit evidence into a connected compliance workflow for cross-border transfer monitoring by VASPs and regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes failed or incomplete Travel Rule events into structured cases for manual review, allowing compliance teams to investigate and resolve exceptions efficiently within the broader workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence including message data, decisions, case history and review logs to support traceability and defensible compliance during regulatory inspections or internal audits.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers and orchestrates their outputs into one operational layer without replacing existing systems or disrupting current compliance technology stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers; it sits above them to organize their outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and reporting for regulated compliance operations.
final_title: Review cross-border Travel Rule workflows with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, exceptions and case evidence into connected compliance operations for VASPs.
